code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < parts.len()
  match parts.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    match string.parse_int(s)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut sum = 0
mut out = ""
mut j = 0
while j < nums.len()
  match nums.get(j)
  when Some(n)
    sum = sum + n
    if j == 0
      out = "#{sum}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{sum}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(out)
